creator: petr.fischer@me.com
text:
Firefox firefox-63.0.3_3,1 (and 63.0.2 and 63.0.1) crashing often - even in safe-mode (without plugins and extensions).

Last log lines before crash:
-----------
lis 30 18:37:54 IPDL protocol error: could not lookup id for PTexture
lis 30 18:37:54 IPDL protocol error: Error deserializing 'textureParent' (PTexture) member of 'TimedTexture'
Process 68049, “firefox” terminated by signal SIGSEGV (Address boundary error)
-----------

FreeBSD 11.2-RELEASE-p4.
Firefox installed from binary package (pkg install).
